# Architecture / 架构

## 中文

浏览器、Koa server、Socket.IO、Hermes Agent Bridge、SQLite、本地文件/配置之间的边界。

## System map / 系统地图

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Browser[Vue Web UI] --> Koa[Koa server]
  Browser <--> SocketIO[Socket.IO realtime]
  Koa --> WebUIDB[(Web UI SQLite)]
  Koa --> HermesState[(Hermes state.db read/bridge paths)]
  Koa --> Bridge[Agent Bridge client]
  Bridge --> Python[hermes_bridge.py / AIAgent]
  Python --> Hermes[Hermes Agent runtime]
  Koa --> Files[File/workspace providers]
  Koa --> Config[Hermes config/auth/profile files]
  Koa --> MCP[MCP + agent-runner services]
```

![chat main overview](assets/screenshots/chat-main-overview.png)

<sub>EN: Demo/manual latest-main screenshot; no private Han data.  \nZH: latest-main 演示/手册截图，不包含 Han 的私人数据。</sub>

## Boundaries / 边界

EN:
- The browser owns navigation, visual state, drawers, tables, modals, local UI preferences, and realtime feedback.
- The server owns API boundaries, auth, Socket.IO/WebSocket coordination, local DB access, and Hermes runtime bridges.
- Chat and History may use different session scopes; verify route, controller, and DB source.

中文：
- 浏览器负责导航、视觉状态、抽屉、表格、弹窗、本地 UI 偏好和实时反馈。
- Server 负责 API 边界、认证、Socket.IO/WebSocket 协调、本地 DB 访问和 Hermes runtime bridge。
- Chat 和 History 的 session scope 可能不同；必须验证 route、controller 和 DB source。

# Hermes Web UI Wiki / Hermes Web UI 双语 Wiki

![Hermes Web UI chat overview](assets/screenshots/chat-main-overview.png)

## 中文

这是 Han 的 fork `hanzckernel/hermes-web-ui` 的审查用双语 Wiki，内容基于 upstream `EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui@0cb047c31e36da2d5e11eb7751c4fa6c48748df3`。它同时服务两类读者：

- 人：快速理解安装、功能、部署、运维和排错。
- Agent：快速定位 route、源码文件、API、截图证据、freshness 和安全边界。

## Start here / 入口

- [Quick Start / 快速开始](01-Quick-Start)
- [Architecture / 架构](02-Architecture)
- [Chat and Sessions / 聊天与会话](03-Chat-and-Sessions)
- [Agent Index / Agent 索引](00-Agent-Index)
- [Screenshot Gallery / 截图库](21-Screenshot-Gallery)

## Core feature map / 核心功能地图

| Area | 页面 | Route | Screenshot |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Chat / 聊天 | [Chat and Sessions](03-Chat-and-Sessions) | `/hermes/chat` | `chat-main-overview.png` |
| History / 历史 | [History and Search](04-History-and-Search) | `/hermes/history` | `history-sessions.png` |
| Models / 模型 | [Models and Providers](05-Models-and-Providers) | `/hermes/models` | `models-management.png` |
| Profiles / Profile | [Profiles](06-Profiles) | `/hermes/profiles` | `profiles-management.png` |
| Group Chat / 群聊 | [Group Chat](07-Group-Chat) | `/hermes/group-chat` | `group-chat-rooms.png` |
| Kanban / 看板 | [Kanban](08-Kanban) | `/hermes/kanban` | `kanban-board.png` |
| Jobs / 定时任务 | [Jobs and Cron](09-Jobs-and-Cron) | `/hermes/jobs` | `jobs-manager.png` |
| Files / 文件 | [Files and Workspaces](10-Files-and-Workspaces) | `/hermes/files` | `files-workspace-drawer.png` |
| Analytics / 分析 | [Usage, Performance, and Skills Analytics](12-Usage-Performance-and-Skills-Analytics) | `/hermes/usage` | `usage-analytics.png` |
| Coding/MCP | [Coding Agents, Global Agent, and MCP](16-Coding-Agents-Global-Agent-and-MCP) | `/hermes/coding-agents` | `coding-agents.png` |

## For agents / 给 Agent

EN: Start from [Agent Index](00-Agent-Index), then read `assets/wiki-index.json`. Each page has an HTML-comment metadata block with languages, routes, source files, and screenshots. Do not treat the wiki as the only spec; verify against latest source and tests before changing code.

ZH: 先读 [Agent Index](00-Agent-Index)，再读 `assets/wiki-index.json`。每个页面顶部都有 HTML 注释 metadata，包含语言、routes、source files、screenshots。不要把 wiki 当成唯一 spec；改代码前仍要回源到源码和 tests。

## Privacy note / 隐私说明

EN: Screenshots are demo/manual assets or isolated latest-main captures. Do not infer Han's real sessions, credentials, logs, profiles, or filesystem from them.

ZH: 截图来自演示/手册资产或隔离 latest-main 运行环境。不要从截图推断 Han 的真实会话、凭据、日志、profiles 或文件系统。
